textByHash.5fb5f5d9798e087453bead475977782144b70de0: Tell us more about your kebabs!
textByHash.23379e7e287ae852536530f21d99ece7ad766363: Do I look like a guide to you?
textByHash.4d76a4290b560e2d48bcb7f16c1bbe02a59443a3: Alright, just head down the stairs, it's easy to find.
textByHash.128d50b20487a1243a26f2228e480cb2407d1ea8: Working of course, can't you see that?
textByHash.b9a1690ce2005fcdca2ddff78d2c52c5b73621a7: Refining the ore that is being brought into the factory, of course.
textByHash.a59c05b21b416ee720b7ad575beef5884b45e19f: It means you should stop asking so many questions and get back to work!
textByHash.7e22f4dee768a421e2dec63e7bdab386a7d74d0e: The Consortium does and that's all you need to know.
textByHash.eb76d9c5d42d777428d495a3d0f71be80cad840d: Oh yes, all the major companies own this plant. It's too vital to be in the hands of one company alone.
textByHash.f9dc37e558e7ac5668b6bb1924b552f40ec98700: I tire of these questions. Let me get back to work!
